description_long: This is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly red and pinkish skin, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The apple has a noticeable bite taken out of one side, exposing the pale, moist flesh beneath the skin. The overall shape is round but slightly asymmetrical, with a gentle taper toward the base. The skin displays subtle speckles and color gradients, typical of many common apple varieties. There are no visible stickers, labels, or significant blemishes aside from the bitten area. The apple appears fresh and ripe, with a firm texture and vibrant coloration.
description: A red apple with a bite taken out, smooth and glossy skin, fresh and ripe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bitten area and exposed white flesh.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the unbitten, smooth red skin.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the rounded, unblemished surface of the apple.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the bite mark and color gradient.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, no other damage
